subject: Felkur's remaining tokens
fact: Felkur had four tokens remaining after using one to cast a sleep spell.
source_quote: Using it left Felkur with four tokens remaining.

subject: Reduction Scrolls used
fact: Two scrolls were used to reduce the fire giant Brandyr by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories.

subject: Reduction size categories
fact: The fire giant Brandyr was reduced by two size categories.
source_quote: Two scrolls were used to reduce her by two size categories.

subject: Divination Artifact sale price
fact: Felkur sold the divination artifact for 45 gold pieces.

subject: Divination Artifact consequence duration
fact: The sale of the artifact triggered years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy.
source_quote: triggering years of investigation by Mulmaster's hierarchy

subject: Reduce spell casts
fact: The Reduce spell was cast twice during the session.

subject: Minor Illusion uses
fact: Minor Illusion was used twice during the session.
